productDisplayName: Carrera Men Leather strap dial and golden frame Brown Watches
description: carrera Has been in the watch industry for more than five decades now and has proven that it is the master of creating high quality timepieces. The new ranges of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic drivers& rsquo and racers& rsquo watch models and are perfect for urban wear.   Case diameter: 39 mm Case thickness: 9 mm Dial shape: Rectangle   Stainless steel case with leather strap Tang clasp with brand inscription Fixed stainless steel bezel for added durability and style White dial with metallic numbers Three sub dials with stopwatch reading Chronograph for easy reading of time Metallic crown to adjust time/date/day Water resistant at 100 meters, making it suitable for use swimming
